headline: Etsy, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings is a critical catalyst for the stock, providing visibility into holiday season performance and gross merchandise sales (GMS) trends. Investors will need to review the attached Exhibit 99.1 to evaluate revenue growth, margin resilience, and management's forward guidance.
